docs.title: Awesome Trek
docs.text: A curated, living list of the best Star Trek reference sites, databases, tools, and archives on the web.

docs.title: Contents
docs.text:
Memory Alpha | memory-alpha.fandom.com the definitive, canon-only wiki (episodes, people, tech, continuity).

Memory Beta | memory-beta.fandom.com the "litverse" wiki for novels, comics, games, and RPGs (licensed/non-canon).

StarTrek.com | startrek.com official site (news, features, franchise pages, watch guides).

Ex Astris Scientia (EAS) | ex-astris-scientia.org long-running reference on ships, tech, continuity, design notes & essays.

Daystrom Institute Technical Library (DITL) | ditl.org database of ships, weapons, species, timelines & more.

TrekCore | trekcore.com massive per-series hubs with screencaps, transcripts (some), audio & news features.

Cygnus-X1 LCARS Blueprints | cygnus-x1.net the largest online archive of Trek blueprints (thousands of sheets).

Trekships (ASDB/FSD) | trekships.org fan-scholarship on obscure classes & design lineage.

Starship Schematics Database | shipschematics.net broad schematics index across eras & factions.

Chakoteya (Chrissie's Transcripts) | chakoteya.net the go-to fan transcripts (TOS/TAS/TNG/DS9/VOY/ENT & films).

ST-Minutiae | st-minutiae.com Impressive collection of details, trivia, and articles.

Forgotten Trek | forgottentrek.com deep behind-the-scenes histories, concept art, & making-of features.

The Trek Collective | thetrekcollective.com long-running blog with book/comic/merch news plus schedules & guides.

TrekNews.net | treknews.net frequent news, previews & reviews (including books & comics).

More coming soon...
